errorPage.body: We couldn't load this seal page. The record may be temporarily unavailable.

copyableEmail.caption: CC this on your next business email

home.subhead: A verifiable record of every business email you send — built automatically, impossible to backdate.

howItWorks.title: Three steps. You're set.
howItWorks.sub: Nothing to install, nothing to configure. You already have everything you need.

step1.title: Send email as you already do
step1.body: You're a freelancer sending an invoice, an agency confirming a brief, a founder replying to a customer. The workflow doesn't change.

step2.title: Add one address to CC
step2.body: Put seal@witnessed.cc in CC on the emails that matter. That's it — no account, no fee.

step3.title: A public seal page builds itself
step3.body: Every CC'd email becomes a timestamped, verified entry on your public seal page. Share the link, or paste the badge in your signature — prospects see a live, growing record of real business.

mock.title: A public page anyone can check.
mock.sub: Real sender. Real timestamps. Real volume. Nothing staged, nothing self-reported.
mock.disclaimerRest: Each entry is verified at the moment of sending — not self-reported.
mock.lookupAria: Enter a domain to look up

why.title: Trust, without the theater.
why.sub: Anyone can generate a polished website, a LinkedIn history, or a wall of testimonials. No one can retroactively send email.
realItems: A real history of real conversations
A track record that only grows with time

privacy.title: Private by design.
privacy.body1: Your emails contain sensitive information. We never see it. The CC reaches us, we verify the sender, record the timestamp, and discard everything else.
privacy.body2: You choose which conversations count. Nothing is collected without an explicit CC from you.
privacy.subject: Email subject

cta.built: Built for freelancers, agencies, startups — anyone who needs to prove they've been here.

seal.disclaimerRest: Each entry is verified at the moment of sending — not self-reported.
seal.buildingBody: Verified requires {days}+ days on record and at least {emails} verified emails.
seal.proof1: Every entry was independently verified at the moment of sending — not self-reported.
seal.proof2: Timestamps are cryptographic. No entry can be backdated — this history only grows forward.
seal.proof3: {domain} was actively doing business on these dates. Proof of operation, not a claim.
seal.rowFootnote: Each row is one independently verified email sent from <d>{name}</d> to that business.
seal.ownThisDomainBody: Add this badge to your email signature, website, or invoice footer. Each view links back to this live seal page.

unclaimed.noOutboundBody: <d>{name}</d> has been the recipient in {count} witnessed {count, plural, =1 {communication} other {communications}} — other businesses are already emailing this domain and CCing Witnessed. But <d>{name}</d> hasn't started building its own outbound record yet.
unclaimed.noRecordBody: <d>{name}</d> hasn't been witnessed yet. CC <e>{addr}</e> on a business email, and this page fills in — automatically, no account needed.
unclaimed.willShow1: Every email CC'd to Witnessed as a verified, timestamped entry — not self-reported.
unclaimed.willShow2: A cryptographic timeline that can't be backdated, with subjects and bodies never stored.
unclaimed.willShow3: A public seal anyone can check — plus a live badge for your email signature, website, and invoices.
unclaimed.startBody: Put this in CC on your next business email. The record starts itself.

badge.imageUrlLabel: Image URL — for email signatures (Gmail, Apple Mail, Outlook)
badge.htmlLabel: HTML snippet — for websites and invoice footers
badge.markdownLabel: Markdown — for READMEs, docs, and GitHub

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.shortBody: We record only what's needed to verify that a business email was sent: the sender's domain, the recipient's domain, the timestamp, and a hash of the DKIM signature. We never see, store, or process the content of your emails. The CC is an explicit, voluntary act — nothing is collected without your deliberate action.
privacyPage.collectIntro: When you CC <addr>seal@witnessed.cc</addr> on an email, we record:
collectItems: the domain portion of your From address (e.g. acme.com)
the domain of the primary recipient
when the email was received by our system
a one-way hash used to verify authenticity; the original signature is discarded
privacyPage.neverIntro: The following are discarded immediately upon receipt and never stored:
neverItems: Personal names, addresses, or contact information
privacyPage.neverFoot: No human at Witnessed ever reads your emails. This is enforced architecturally — email content never reaches our database.
privacyPage.useIntro: The data we collect is used solely to:
useItems: Build and display the public seal page for your domain at witnessed.cc/b/yourdomain
Compute the verified business history metrics shown on that page
Power the verification record that proves your business has been operational over time
privacyPage.useFoot: We do not sell data, share it with third parties for advertising, or use it for any purpose other than the above.
privacyPage.consentBody: The CC is an explicit, voluntary act on each individual email. You are in full control of which emails contribute to your record. There is no passive collection — Witnessed only receives data when you deliberately include the address in a CC field.
privacyPage.publicBody: Seal pages are public by design. The domain name, event count, first-seen date, and recipient domains are visible to anyone who visits your seal page. This is the product — the public proof of business activity. If you do not want a public record for your domain, do not CC the address.
privacyPage.retentionBody: Your domain's history is retained for as long as the service operates. You may request deletion of all records associated with your domain at any time by emailing <mail>hello@witnessed.cc</mail> from an address at that domain. Deletion is permanent and irreversible.
privacyPage.infraBody: Data is stored on Vercel Postgres (Neon), encrypted at rest and in transit. Access is restricted to the application layer. No employee has direct database access in production.
privacyPage.changesBody: If we make material changes, we will update the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.whatBody: Witnessed (witnessed.cc) is a service that builds a verified business history for email domains. When you CC seal@witnessed.cc on a business email, we verify the DKIM signature, record the metadata, and add it to the public proof-of-business record for your domain.
termsPage.acceptanceBody: By using this service — including by CCing our address, visiting a seal page, or using the verification API — you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
termsPage.useIntro: You agree not to use Witnessed to:
useItems: Generate false or misleading business history (e.g. coordinated networks of domains CCing each other to manufacture artificial credibility)
Impersonate another business or domain you do not control
Attempt to manipulate, reverse-engineer, or tamper with the verification system
Abuse the service in a way that degrades performance for other users
termsPage.useFoot: We reserve the right to remove, flag, or permanently downgrade records associated with domains found to be engaging in manipulation.
termsPage.publicBody: Once your domain has been witnessed, a public seal page exists at witnessed.cc/b/yourdomain. This page is publicly accessible and indexed. You agree that building a record using our service means this page may be visible to anyone.
termsPage.provesTitle: What Witnessed proves and does not prove
termsPage.provesBody1: Witnessed proves that a domain has been sending DKIM-authenticated email to real counterparties over a period of time. It does not prove legal standing, financial solvency, compliance with any regulation, or the quality or legitimacy of the underlying business activity.
termsPage.provesBody2: Verified status is a signal, not a guarantee. Do not rely on a Witnessed record as the sole basis for a high-stakes business decision.
termsPage.availabilityBody: We provide Witnessed on an as-is, as-available basis. We do not guarantee uptime, data retention beyond reasonable commercial practice, or continuity of the service. We will make reasonable efforts to preserve records, but cannot be held liable for data loss.
termsPage.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Witnessed and its operators are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the service, including but not limited to loss of business, loss of data, or reliance on a verified record.
termsPage.terminationBody1: We may suspend or terminate access to the service at any time, with or without notice, for conduct that violates these terms or that we determine is harmful to the integrity of the record.
termsPage.terminationBody2: You may request deletion of your domain's record at any time. See our <link>Privacy Policy</link> for details.
termsPage.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. We will update the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
